{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","messages":[{"role":"user","content":[{"type":"text","text":"<system-reminder>
The following skills are available for use with the Skill tool:

- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them.
